title: PD Evidence-to-Discovery Dataset
subtitle: Evidence, omics, pathways, trials and repurposing assets for PD
description: This dataset contains processed outputs from an AI-assisted evidence-to-discovery project on Parkinson's disease prevention and disease-modifying strategy prioritisation. Assets include ranked candidate interventions, pathway-to-intervention mappings, individual prevention measures, ClinicalTrials.gov mining outputs, GSE72267 limma differential-expression outputs, GO and exploratory Reactome enrichment outputs, drug-repurposing candidate rankings, manuscript tables, publication-ready figures, scripts, reference audit files, and reproducibility logs. The dataset is for research, education, reproducibility, and hypothesis generation only. It does not identify a cure and does not recommend investigational or repurposed drugs for clinical use outside approved indications or clinical trials.
